---
title: "BBB 26 — Provas"
subtitle: "Resultados e classificação geral das provas"
lang: pt-BR
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

from pathlib import Path
import re
import statistics
from collections import defaultdict
import sys

sys.path.append(str(Path("scripts").resolve()))
from data_utils import (
    require_clean_manual_events,
    setup_bbb_dark_theme,
    load_participants_index,
    load_prova_rankings,
    load_provas_raw,
    GROUP_COLORS,
)

require_clean_manual_events()
setup_bbb_dark_theme()


def emit(html: str) -> None:
    print("\n".join(line.lstrip() for line in html.splitlines()))


def slugify_name(name: str) -> str:
    base = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", name.lower()).strip("-")
    return base or "participante"


rankings = load_prova_rankings()
leaderboard = rankings.get("leaderboard", [])
scoring = rankings.get("_metadata", {}).get("scoring", {})

provas_raw = load_provas_raw()
provas_list = provas_raw.get("provas", [])

participants_index = load_participants_index()
PINFO = {p["name"]: p for p in participants_index.get("participants", [])}

TIPO_EMOJI = {"lider": "👑", "anjo": "😇", "bate_volta": "⚔️"}
TIPO_LABEL = {"lider": "Líder", "anjo": "Anjo", "bate_volta": "Bate e Volta"}
TIPO_COLOR = {"lider": "#f1c40f", "anjo": "#3498db", "bate_volta": "#e74c3c"}


def get_avatar(name: str) -> str:
    return PINFO.get(name, {}).get("avatar", "")


def get_grupo(name: str) -> str:
    return PINFO.get(name, {}).get("grupo", "Pipoca")


def is_active(name: str) -> bool:
    return PINFO.get(name, {}).get("active", True)


def get_status(name: str) -> str:
    return PINFO.get(name, {}).get("status", "")


def get_winners(prova: dict) -> list[str]:
    winners = prova.get("vencedores")
    if isinstance(winners, list) and winners:
        return [w for w in winners if isinstance(w, str) and w.strip()]
    winner = prova.get("vencedor")
    if isinstance(winner, str) and winner.strip():
        return [winner]
    return []


total_provas = len(provas_list)
ranked_participants = len(leaderboard)

unique_winner_names = set()
for prova in provas_list:
    unique_winner_names.update(get_winners(prova))

all_weighted_points = [
    detail.get("weighted_pts")
    for p in leaderboard
    for detail in p.get("detail", [])
    if detail.get("weighted_pts") is not None
]
global_avg_points = round(sum(all_weighted_points) / len(all_weighted_points), 2) if all_weighted_points else 0.0

leaderboard_sorted = sorted(
    leaderboard,
    key=lambda p: (-p.get("total_points", 0), -p.get("wins", 0), p.get("name", "")),
)

lowest_total_active = sorted(
    [p for p in leaderboard if is_active(p['name'])],
    key=lambda p: (p.get("total_points", 0), p.get("wins", 0), p.get("name", "")),
)

# qualidade mínima: provas_participated >= 6
best_avg = sorted(
    [p for p in leaderboard if p["provas_participated"] >= 6],
    key=lambda p: (-p.get("avg_points", 0), -p.get("total_points", 0), p.get("name", "")),
)

top3_rate_candidates = []
for p in leaderboard:
    if p["provas_participated"] >= 6:
        top3_rate = (p.get("top3", 0) / p.get("provas_participated", 1)) if p.get("provas_participated") else 0
        top3_rate_candidates.append({**p, "top3_rate": top3_rate})

best_top3_rate = sorted(
    top3_rate_candidates,
    key=lambda p: (-p.get("top3_rate", 0), -p.get("top3", 0), -p.get("total_points", 0), p.get("name", "")),
)


def build_type_totals(participant: dict) -> dict[str, float]:
    totals = {"lider": 0.0, "anjo": 0.0, "bate_volta": 0.0}
    for detail in participant.get("detail", []):
        tipo = detail.get("tipo")
        pts = detail.get("weighted_pts")
        if tipo in totals and pts is not None:
            totals[tipo] += pts
    return {k: round(v, 2) for k, v in totals.items()}


def build_reason_for_total(participant: dict) -> str:
    return (
        f"{participant.get('wins', 0)} vitória(s) · "
        f"{participant.get('top3', 0)} pódio(s) · "
        f"{participant.get('provas_participated', 0)} prova(s) disputada(s)"
    )


def build_reason_for_avg(participant: dict) -> str:
    return (
        f"média {participant.get('avg_points', 0):.2f} por prova · "
        f"{participant.get('provas_participated', 0)} participações"
    )


def build_reason_for_top3_rate(participant: dict) -> str:
    rate = participant.get("top3_rate", 0)
    return (
        f"taxa de pódio {rate * 100:.1f}% · "
        f"{participant.get('top3', 0)}/{participant.get('provas_participated', 0)}"
    )


def best_type_specialist(tipo: str, min_count: int) -> dict | None:
    candidates = []
    for participant in leaderboard:
        pts = [
            d.get("weighted_pts")
            for d in participant.get("detail", [])
            if d.get("tipo") == tipo and d.get("weighted_pts") is not None
        ]
        if len(pts) < min_count:
            continue
        total = round(sum(pts), 2)
        avg = round(total / len(pts), 2)
        candidates.append(
            {
                "name": participant.get("name"),
                "total": total,
                "avg": avg,
                "count": len(pts),
                "active": is_active(participant.get("name")),
                "status": get_status(participant.get("name")),
                "avatar": get_avatar(participant.get("name")),
            }
        )
    if not candidates:
        return None
    candidates.sort(key=lambda item: (-item["total"], -item["avg"], item["name"]))
    return candidates[0]


def most_consistent(min_participation: int) -> dict | None:
    candidates = []
    for participant in leaderboard:
        pts = [
            d.get("weighted_pts")
            for d in participant.get("detail", [])
            if d.get("weighted_pts") is not None
        ]
        if len(pts) < min_participation:
            continue
        sd = statistics.pstdev(pts)
        candidates.append(
            {
                "name": participant.get("name"),
                "sd": round(sd, 3),
                "avg": round(sum(pts) / len(pts), 2),
                "count": len(pts),
                "active": is_active(participant.get("name")),
                "status": get_status(participant.get("name")),
                "avatar": get_avatar(participant.get("name")),
            }
        )
    if not candidates:
        return None
    candidates.sort(key=lambda item: (item["sd"], -item["avg"], item["name"]))
    return candidates[0]


lider_specialist = best_type_specialist("lider", 3)
anjo_specialist = best_type_specialist("anjo", 3)
bv_specialist = best_type_specialist("bate_volta", 1)
consistent_specialist = most_consistent(6)
```

<div class="provas-page" id="provas-page" hidden></div>

```{python}
#| label: shell-top
#| output: asis

emit(f'''
<nav id="provas-quick-jump" class="provas-jump-nav" aria-label="Atalhos da página Provas">
  <a class="provas-jump-link" href="#participantes">Participantes</a>
  <a class="provas-jump-link" href="#provas">Provas</a>
  <a class="provas-jump-link" href="#pontuacao">Sistema de Pontuação</a>
</nav>

<section class="provas-kpi-grid" aria-label="Indicadores gerais de provas">
  <article class="provas-kpi provas-kpi-total">
    <p class="provas-kpi-value">{total_provas}</p>
    <p class="provas-kpi-label">Provas Registradas</p>
  </article>
  <article class="provas-kpi provas-kpi-winners">
    <p class="provas-kpi-value">{len(unique_winner_names)}</p>
    <p class="provas-kpi-label">Vencedores Únicos</p>
  </article>
  <article class="provas-kpi provas-kpi-players">
    <p class="provas-kpi-value">{ranked_participants}</p>
    <p class="provas-kpi-label">Participantes Rankeados</p>
  </article>
  <article class="provas-kpi provas-kpi-avg">
    <p class="provas-kpi-value">{global_avg_points:.2f}</p>
    <p class="provas-kpi-label">Média Global por Participação</p>
  </article>
</section>
''')
```

```{python}
#| label: trajectory-top5
#| output: asis


def render_top5_card(
    tone_class: str,
    title: str,
    rows: list[dict],
    value_formatter,
    reason_formatter,
    empty_text: str,
    caption: str,
    bar_value_getter,
):
    if not rows:
        emit(f'''
<article class="provas-top5-card {tone_class}">
  <p class="provas-top5-kicker">{title}</p>
  <p class="provas-top5-empty">{empty_text}</p>
  <p class="provas-top5-caption">{caption}</p>
</article>
''')
        return

    max_abs = max(abs(bar_value_getter(item)) for item in rows) or 1

    emit(f'''
<article class="provas-top5-card {tone_class}">
  <p class="provas-top5-kicker">{title}</p>
  <div class="provas-top5-list">
''')

    for index, row in enumerate(rows[:5], start=1):
        name = row.get("name", "?")
        avatar = get_avatar(name)
        active = is_active(name)
        status = get_status(name)
        row_class = " is-inactive" if not active else ""
        status_badge = f'<span class="provas-status-badge">{status or "saiu"}</span>' if not active else ""

        value = value_formatter(row)
        reason = reason_formatter(row)
        bar_value = bar_value_getter(row)
        width = abs(bar_value) / max_abs * 100

        emit(f'''
<div class="provas-top5-row{row_class}" title="{reason}">
  <p class="provas-top5-rank">{index}</p>
''')
        if avatar:
            emit(f'<img src="{avatar}" alt="Avatar {name}" class="provas-top5-avatar">')
        else:
            emit('<div class="provas-top5-avatar provas-avatar-fallback">?</div>')

        emit(f'''
  <div class="provas-top5-main">
    <p class="provas-top5-name">{name}</p>
    {status_badge}
    <div class="provas-top5-bar"><div class="provas-top5-fill" style="width:{width:.1f}%;"></div></div>
    <details class="provas-top5-row-reason">
      <summary class="provas-top5-row-reason-toggle">Ver motivo</summary>
      <p class="provas-top5-row-reason-text">{reason}</p>
    </details>
  </div>
  <p class="provas-top5-value">{value}</p>
</div>
''')

    emit(f'''
  </div>
  <p class="provas-top5-caption">{caption}</p>
</article>
''')


emit('<section class="provas-top5-grid" aria-label="Destaques de trajetória e qualidade">')

render_top5_card(
    "tone-positive",
    "TOP 5 PONTUAÇÃO ACUMULADA",
    leaderboard_sorted,
    value_formatter=lambda row: f"{row.get('total_points', 0):+.2f}",
    reason_formatter=build_reason_for_total,
    empty_text="Sem dados de pontuação acumulada.",
    caption="temporada completa · inclui participantes ativos e eliminados",
    bar_value_getter=lambda row: row.get("total_points", 0),
)

render_top5_card(
    "tone-negative",
    "TOP 5 MENOR PONTUAÇÃO ACUMULADA",
    lowest_total_active,
    value_formatter=lambda row: f"{row.get('total_points', 0):+.2f}",
    reason_formatter=build_reason_for_total,
    empty_text="Sem participantes ativos elegíveis.",
    caption="temporada completa · apenas participantes ainda no jogo",
    bar_value_getter=lambda row: row.get("total_points", 0),
)

render_top5_card(
    "tone-neutral",
    "TOP 5 MELHOR MÉDIA",
    best_avg,
    value_formatter=lambda row: f"{row.get('avg_points', 0):.2f}",
    reason_formatter=build_reason_for_avg,
    empty_text="Dados insuficientes (mínimo de 6 provas).",
    caption="qualidade por prova · mínimo de 6 participações",
    bar_value_getter=lambda row: row.get("avg_points", 0),
)

render_top5_card(
    "tone-neutral",
    "TOP 5 MELHOR TAXA DE PÓDIO",
    best_top3_rate,
    value_formatter=lambda row: f"{row.get('top3_rate', 0) * 100:.1f}%",
    reason_formatter=build_reason_for_top3_rate,
    empty_text="Dados insuficientes (mínimo de 6 provas).",
    caption="consistência de elite · mínimo de 6 participações",
    bar_value_getter=lambda row: row.get("top3_rate", 0),
)

print('</section>')


def render_curiosity_card(title: str, payload: dict | None, value_label: str, fallback: str):
    if payload is None:
        emit(f'''
<article class="provas-curiosity-card">
  <p class="provas-curiosity-title">{title}</p>
  <p class="provas-curiosity-empty">{fallback}</p>
</article>
''')
        return

    avatar = payload.get("avatar", "")
    name = payload.get("name", "?")
    status_badge = f'<span class="provas-status-badge">{payload.get("status") or "saiu"}</span>' if not payload.get("active", True) else ""

    emit(f'''
<article class="provas-curiosity-card">
  <p class="provas-curiosity-title">{title}</p>
  <div class="provas-curiosity-main">
''')
    if avatar:
        emit(f'<img src="{avatar}" alt="Avatar {name}" class="provas-curiosity-avatar">')
    else:
        emit('<div class="provas-curiosity-avatar provas-avatar-fallback">?</div>')

    emit(f'''
    <div>
      <p class="provas-curiosity-name">{name}</p>
      {status_badge}
      <p class="provas-curiosity-value">{value_label(payload)}</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</article>
''')


emit('<section class="provas-curiosities-grid" aria-label="Curiosidades objetivas de performance">')

render_curiosity_card(
    "Especialista em Prova do Líder",
    lider_specialist,
    value_label=lambda p: f"{p['total']:+.2f} em {p['count']} prova(s) de líder",
    fallback="dados ainda insuficientes",
)
render_curiosity_card(
    "Especialista em Prova do Anjo",
    anjo_specialist,
    value_label=lambda p: f"{p['total']:+.2f} em {p['count']} prova(s) de anjo",
    fallback="dados ainda insuficientes",
)
render_curiosity_card(
    "Destaque em Bate e Volta",
    bv_specialist,
    value_label=lambda p: f"{p['total']:+.2f} em {p['count']} bate e volta",
    fallback="dados ainda insuficientes",
)
render_curiosity_card(
    "Maior consistência",
    consistent_specialist,
    value_label=lambda p: f"desvio {p['sd']:.3f} · média {p['avg']:.2f} ({p['count']} provas)",
    fallback="dados ainda insuficientes",
)

print('</section>')
```

## Participantes {#participantes}

Cards completos com foco na trajetória acumulada, consistência e especialidades por tipo de prova.

<div id="ranking" class="provas-legacy-anchor" aria-hidden="true"></div>

```{python}
#| label: participant-cards
#| output: asis

if not leaderboard_sorted:
    print('<p class="text-muted">Nenhum participante encontrado.</p>')
else:
    emit('<section class="provas-player-cards-grid" aria-label="Cards de participantes no ranking de provas">')

    for participant in leaderboard_sorted:
        name = participant.get("name", "?")
        total = participant.get("total_points", 0)
        avg = participant.get("avg_points", 0)
        wins = participant.get("wins", 0)
        top3 = participant.get("top3", 0)
        participated = participant.get("provas_participated", 0)
        available = participant.get("provas_available", 0)
        rate = participant.get("participation_rate", 0)

        active = is_active(name)
        status = get_status(name)
        avatar = get_avatar(name)
        grupo = get_grupo(name)

        type_totals = build_type_totals(participant)
        podium_rate = (top3 / participated) if participated else 0

        accent = GROUP_COLORS.get(grupo, "#666")
        state_attr = ' data-player-state="inactive"' if not active else ""
        status_badge = f'<span class="provas-status-badge">{status or "saiu"}</span>' if not active else ""
        name_slug = slugify_name(name)

        recent = [
            detail
            for detail in participant.get("detail", [])
            if detail.get("weighted_pts") is not None
        ]
        recent.sort(key=lambda item: item.get("prova", 0), reverse=True)
        recent = recent[:5]

        emit(f'''
<article id="provas-player-{name_slug}" class="provas-player-card" style="--card-accent:{accent};"{state_attr}>
  <header class="provas-player-head">
    <div class="provas-player-avatar-wrap">
''')
        if avatar:
            emit(f'<img src="{avatar}" alt="Avatar {name}" class="provas-player-avatar">')
        else:
            emit('<div class="provas-player-avatar provas-avatar-fallback">?</div>')

        emit(f'''
    </div>
    <div class="provas-player-identity">
      <p class="provas-player-name-line">
        <span class="provas-player-name">{name}</span>
        <span class="provas-group-badge">{grupo}</span>
      </p>
      {status_badge}
      <p class="provas-player-total">{total:+.2f}</p>
    </div>
  </header>

  <div class="provas-player-metrics">
    <div class="provas-player-metric"><span class="label">Média</span><span class="value">{avg:.2f}</span></div>
    <div class="provas-player-metric"><span class="label">Pódio</span><span class="value">{podium_rate * 100:.1f}%</span></div>
    <div class="provas-player-metric"><span class="label">Vitórias</span><span class="value">{wins}</span></div>
    <div class="provas-player-metric"><span class="label">Participação</span><span class="value">{participated}/{available}</span></div>
    <div class="provas-player-metric"><span class="label">Presença</span><span class="value">{rate * 100:.0f}%</span></div>
  </div>

  <div class="provas-player-type-grid">
    <div class="provas-player-type-card"><span>👑 Líder</span><strong>{type_totals['lider']:+.2f}</strong></div>
    <div class="provas-player-type-card"><span>😇 Anjo</span><strong>{type_totals['anjo']:+.2f}</strong></div>
    <div class="provas-player-type-card"><span>⚔️ Bate e Volta</span><strong>{type_totals['bate_volta']:+.2f}</strong></div>
  </div>

  <section class="provas-player-recent">
    <p class="provas-player-section-title">Últimas provas com pontuação válida</p>
    <div class="provas-player-recent-list">
''')

        if recent:
            for entry in recent:
                tipo = entry.get("tipo", "")
                emoji = TIPO_EMOJI.get(tipo, "🏅")
                label = TIPO_LABEL.get(tipo, tipo.title())
                prova_num = entry.get("prova", "?")
                pts = entry.get("weighted_pts", 0)
                tone = "points-pos" if pts > 0 else ("points-neg" if pts < 0 else "points-zero")
                emit(f'''
      <div class="provas-player-recent-row">
        <span class="name">{emoji} Prova #{prova_num} · {label}</span>
        <span class="value {tone}">{pts:+.2f}</span>
      </div>
''')
        else:
            emit('''
      <div class="provas-player-recent-row">
        <span class="name">Sem pontuações registradas.</span>
        <span class="value points-zero">0</span>
      </div>
''')

        emit('''
    </div>
  </section>
</article>
''')

    print('</section>')
```

## Provas {#provas}

Leitura cronológica das provas com fases, classificações e pontos atribuídos.

```{python}
#| label: provas-history
#| output: asis

if not provas_list:
    print('*Nenhuma prova registrada ainda.*')
else:
    provas_sorted = sorted(provas_list, key=lambda prova: prova.get("numero", 0), reverse=True)
    emit('<section class="provas-history-accordion" aria-label="Histórico detalhado das provas">')

    for idx, prova in enumerate(provas_sorted):
        numero = prova.get("numero", "?")
        tipo = prova.get("tipo", "")
        week = prova.get("week", "?")
        nome = prova.get("nome", "Prova")
        date = prova.get("date", "")
        emoji = TIPO_EMOJI.get(tipo, "🏅")
        tipo_label = TIPO_LABEL.get(tipo, tipo.title())
        participantes_total = prova.get("participantes_total", 0)
        winners = get_winners(prova)
        winner_line = ", ".join(winners) if winners else "—"
        fases = prova.get("fases", [])
        excluidos = prova.get("excluidos", [])
        open_attr = " open" if idx == 0 else ""

        emit(f'''
<details class="provas-prova-details"{open_attr}>
  <summary class="provas-prova-summary">
    <span class="provas-prova-summary-main">{emoji} #{numero} · {tipo_label} · {nome}</span>
    <span class="provas-prova-summary-meta">{date} · Semana {week} · {participantes_total} participantes</span>
  </summary>
  <div class="provas-prova-body">
    <div class="provas-prova-headline">
      <span class="provas-chip">🏆 Vencedor(es): {winner_line}</span>
      <span class="provas-chip">📅 {date}</span>
      <span class="provas-chip">📋 {len(fases)} fase(s)</span>
    </div>
''')

        if excluidos:
            excluded_text = ", ".join(f"{entry.get('nome', '?')} ({entry.get('motivo', 'sem motivo')})" for entry in excluidos)
            emit(f'<p class="provas-excluded">🚫 Não participaram: {excluded_text}</p>')

        for fase in fases:
            fase_num = fase.get("fase", "?")
            fase_tipo = fase.get("tipo", "individual")
            fase_label = "Dupla" if fase_tipo == "dupla" else "Individual"
            nota = fase.get("nota", "")
            classificacao = fase.get("classificacao", [])
            has_scores = any(entry.get("pontuacao") is not None for entry in classificacao)

            emit(f'''
<section class="provas-phase-block">
  <p class="provas-phase-title">Fase {fase_num} · {fase_label}</p>
''')
            if nota:
                emit(f'<p class="provas-phase-note">{nota}</p>')

            if classificacao:
                emit('''
  <div class="provas-table-wrap">
    <table class="provas-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Pos</th>
          <th>Participante(s)</th>
''')
                if has_scores:
                    emit("          <th>Pontuação</th>")
                emit('''
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
''')

                for entry in classificacao:
                    pos = entry.get("pos")
                    dq = bool(entry.get("dq") or entry.get("eliminados"))
                    tied = bool(entry.get("tied"))

                    if "dupla" in entry:
                        entry_name = " + ".join(entry.get("dupla", []))
                    elif "membros" in entry:
                        entry_name = " + ".join(entry.get("membros", []))
                    else:
                        entry_name = entry.get("nome", "?")

                    pos_str = "DQ" if dq else (f"{pos}º" if pos is not None else "—")
                    tie_mark = " = empate" if tied else ""
                    score = entry.get("pontuacao")

                    emit(f'''
        <tr>
          <td>{pos_str}{tie_mark}</td>
          <td>{entry_name}</td>
''')
                    if has_scores:
                        emit(f"          <td>{score if score is not None else '—'}</td>")
                    emit("        </tr>")

                emit('''
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
''')
            else:
                emit('<p class="provas-phase-empty">Sem classificação detalhada.</p>')

            emit('</section>')

        scored_entries = []
        for participant in leaderboard:
            for detail in participant.get("detail", []):
                if detail.get("prova") != numero:
                    continue
                if detail.get("weighted_pts") is None:
                    continue
                scored_entries.append(
                    {
                        "name": participant.get("name", "?"),
                        "position": detail.get("position"),
                        "base_pts": detail.get("base_pts"),
                        "weighted_pts": detail.get("weighted_pts"),
                    }
                )

        scored_entries.sort(
            key=lambda item: (
                2 if item["position"] == "dq" else (1 if item["position"] is None else 0),
                item["position"] if isinstance(item["position"], int) else 999,
                item["name"],
            )
        )

        if scored_entries:
            collapse_id = f"provas-collapse-{numero}"
            emit(f'''
<details class="provas-points-details">
  <summary class="provas-points-summary">📊 Pontos atribuídos nesta prova</summary>
  <div id="{collapse_id}" class="provas-points-list provas-collapse">
''')

            for row_index, row in enumerate(scored_entries):
                extra_class = " provas-collapse-extra" if row_index >= 6 else ""
                pos = row.get("position")
                pos_str = "DQ" if pos == "dq" else (f"{pos}º" if isinstance(pos, int) else "—")
                pts = row.get("weighted_pts", 0)
                tone = "points-pos" if pts > 0 else ("points-neg" if pts < 0 else "points-zero")
                emit(f'''
    <div class="provas-point-row{extra_class}">
      <span class="name">{row.get('name', '?')}</span>
      <span class="meta">{pos_str} · base {row.get('base_pts', '—')}</span>
      <span class="value {tone}">{pts:+.2f}</span>
    </div>
''')

            emit('''
  </div>
''')
            if len(scored_entries) > 6:
                emit(f'''
<button type="button"
  class="provas-collapse-toggle"
  id="provas-collapse-toggle-{numero}"
  data-target="{collapse_id}"
  data-label-more="Ver pontuações completas"
  data-label-less="Ver resumo de pontuações">
  Ver pontuações completas
</button>
''')
            emit('</details>')

        emit('''
  </div>
</details>
''')

    print('</section>')
```

## Sistema de Pontuação {#pontuacao}

<div class="provas-rules-block">

**Como funciona o ranking de provas**

O ranking combina posição final e importância estratégica de cada tipo de prova.

- Posição final define os pontos-base.
- Cada tipo de prova aplica um multiplicador específico.
- Desclassificação (DQ) pontua zero na prova.
- Participantes que não estavam elegíveis para disputar não são penalizados.

</div>

```{python}
#| label: points-reference
#| output: asis

placement_pts = scoring.get("placement_points", {})
default_pts = scoring.get("placement_default", 0)
multipliers = scoring.get("type_multipliers", {})

emit('''
<div class="provas-points-grid">
  <section class="provas-points-card">
    <h4>🏅 Pontos por posição</h4>
    <table class="provas-table">
      <thead>
        <tr><th>Posição</th><th>Pontos-base</th></tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
''')

for pos, pts in sorted(placement_pts.items(), key=lambda item: int(item[0])):
    medal = "🥇" if pos == "1" else ("🥈" if pos == "2" else ("🥉" if pos == "3" else ""))
    emit(f"        <tr><td>{medal} {pos}º</td><td>{pts}</td></tr>")

emit(f"        <tr><td>9º+ lugar</td><td>{default_pts}</td></tr>")
emit("        <tr><td>DQ</td><td>0</td></tr>")

emit('''
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </section>

  <section class="provas-points-card">
    <h4>⚖️ Multiplicadores por tipo</h4>
    <table class="provas-table">
      <thead>
        <tr><th>Tipo</th><th>Multiplicador</th></tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
''')

for tipo, mult in sorted(multipliers.items(), key=lambda item: -item[1]):
    emoji = TIPO_EMOJI.get(tipo, "🏅")
    label = TIPO_LABEL.get(tipo, tipo.title())
    emit(f"        <tr><td>{emoji} {label}</td><td>{mult:.2f}×</td></tr>")

emit('''
      </tbody>
    </table>
    <p class="provas-points-formula">Fórmula: <code>pontos_base × multiplicador</code></p>
  </section>
</div>
''')

emit('<p class="provas-muted">Painel orientado a desempenho acumulado, com atualização conforme os resultados oficiais das provas.</p>')
```
